summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of updated GEO Boost Engine landing page. Verified all 15 requested features including emerald green CTAs, 847+ businesses trust badge, 4-stat section with correct colors, 6 testimonials with revenue badges and Before quotes, section labels with proper colors, urgency banner, and 2026 footer.

design_issues.issue: Still shows '127+ businesses' instead of updated '847+ businesses'

passed_tests: Hero section with emerald green CTA button (rgb(16, 185, 129))
Trust badge shows '847+ local businesses' correctly
Stats section displays 4 stats: 847 businesses (white), 94% leads (emerald), $2.1M revenue (cyan), 4.9/5 rating (amber)
Testimonials section shows 6 testimonials with revenue badges (+$12,400/month format)
Each testimonial has 'Before:' quote in rose color (text-rose-400/80)
Each testimonial displays 5-star ratings with amber filled stars
Problem section has rose-colored label 'The Hidden Problem'
Solution section has cyan-colored label 'The Solution'
How It Works section has violet-colored label 'Simple Process'
Pricing section has emerald label 'Pricing' and $199 in emerald green
All 5 CTA buttons use emerald green background colors
Urgency banner shows amber warning text 'Only 10 reports generated per day'
Footer shows '© 2026 GEO Boost Engine. All rights reserved.'
Hero headline includes gradient text for 'ChatGPT & Google AI'
Page loads without errors and all interactive elements are functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Update final CTA section text from '127+ businesses' to '847+ businesses' to match the updated branding throughout the rest of the page (line 665 in LandingPage.jsx)
